alignments/read_cloud.name: alignments/read_cloud

PARTIAL (re-review/eyeball): 1.5px min-width clamp already satisfies >=1px and is in the current PNG (the bad status predated the regen). Also bumped flat-line alpha 0.25->0.4 (shader + canvas) so isolated short-insert pairs are less transparent; this dataset has few of them (0.4% pixel diff) so the gain is subtle — finer tuning best done live.
